mission.title: We make artificial intelligence accessible to all
mission.paragraph1: At Magnific Digital, we build AI-powered web and mobile applications that are accessible to businesses of every size.
mission.paragraph2: SMBs, startups, large organizations — we develop intelligent digital solutions that boost your productivity, enhance customer experience, and automate your critical processes.

services.title: Our Innovative Solutions
services.subtitle: AI-powered web & mobile apps, chatbots, voice agents, and training to transform your business.

webApps.title: Web & Mobile Apps
webApps.description: Custom AI-powered web and mobile applications: predictive analytics, intelligent automation, dynamic dashboards, and optimized user experience.

chatbots.title: Chatbots & Conversational Agents
chatbots.description: 24/7 customer service, WhatsApp/Messenger/API integration, 60% reduction in repetitive inquiries.

voiceAgents.title: Intelligent Voice Agents
voiceAgents.description: AI assistants to automate inbound calls, lead qualification, customer follow-up, and technical support.

training.title: AI Training & Consulting
training.description: Hands-on workshops: AI fundamentals, prompt engineering, automation, and internal chatbot integration for your teams.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, proven process to integrate AI into your business.

step1.title: Needs Assessment
step1.description: Free consultation to understand your challenges and identify AI opportunities within your business.

step2.title: Custom Design
step2.description: Our team designs the right AI solution for you: chatbot, voice agent, web app, or tailored training program.

step3.title: Agile Development
step3.description: Iterative development with regular demos. You validate every step before moving forward.

step4.title: Deployment & Training
step4.description: Production launch, team training, and post-launch support to ensure your success.

whyUs.title: Why choose Magnific Digital?
whyUs.subtitle: A team passionate about AI, dedicated to your success.

expertise.title: Applied AI Expertise
expertise.description: We turn your business needs into practical, high-ROI AI solutions.

team.title: Multidisciplinary Team
team.description: AI developers, UX/UI designers, certified trainers — all under one roof.

support.title: End-to-End Support
support.description: From strategy to team training, we support you every step of the way.

testimonials.title: Trusted by businesses like yours
testimonials.subtitle: Discover why our clients love working with Magnific Digital and how AI is transforming their business.

results.title: Our clients are transforming their business
results.quote: Thanks to Magnific Digital, our chatbot handles 85% of customer inquiries automatically.
